title: monitor-and-check execute-task capability_mismatch
summary: Agent attempted to monitor a cloud service's status by scraping a public status page, but the page structure changed and the scraper broke.

evidence.desired_outcome: Monitor the operational status of a cloud service and alert on incidents.
evidence.symptom: The web scraper broke after the status page was redesigned. The CSS selectors no longer match.
evidence.context: The service provider offers an official status API with structured incident data.
evidence.failed_step: Web scraper CSS selectors no longer match redesigned status page
reproduction_steps: Ran scraper — selectors failed to match
Updated selectors for new page structure — different elements broke next day

inference.why_current_path_failed: Web scraping a status page is a fragile approach. The page structure can change at any time.
inference.best_candidate_route_detail: Configure the cloud-status-api-mcp connector using the available API key for structured, stable data.
